title: Configurable rank-2 staged candidate scan window env
problem: Ticket-251 hardcodes DEFAULT_RANK2_SCAN_WINDOW=10 in staged_candidate_selection. Operators hitting catalog drift may need a bounded env override without code changes.
acceptance_criteria: RGE_STAGED_RANK2_SCAN_MAX env overrides default scan window with sane bounds.
CLI and live pytest helpers honor override.
Unit tests cover default and override.
rollback_plan: Revert env override; restore fixed window.
